hooks.command: if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_FILE_PATH" == *.ts ]] || [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_FILE_PATH" == *.tsx ]]; then cd /home/dev/Projects/3v/3v_mono && npx prettier --write "$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi

if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_FILE_PATH" == */@gql/* ]] || [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_FILE_PATH" == */node_modules/* ]] || [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_FILE_PATH" == */pnpm-lock.yaml ]] || [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_FILE_PATH" == */dist/* ]] || [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_FILE_PATH" == */build/* ]]; then echo '{"decision": "deny", "reason": "Cannot edit generated/dependency files (@gql/*, node_modules/*, pnpm-lock.yaml, dist/*, build/*)"}'; fi
echo 'Check if all your assigned tasks are completed. If not, continue working on them.'
